steps.title: Identify the three key movements
steps.content:
The passage presents a study finding (high moonlight inhibits the bats) and explains it in cost-benefit terms.

Then it generalizes: “Most other nocturnal mammals respond similarly,” marking the finding as representative.

Finally, it introduces an exception: “but mongoose lemurs... display the opposite pattern, as their visual foraging changes the risk-reward balance”—so the exception is explained, not just noted.

steps.title: Match the structure to the answer choices
steps.content:
B correctly maps this structure: a finding with explanation, a generalization characterizing it as representative, and an exception with its own explanation.

The other choices misread the passage—A and D wrongly suggest the exception lacks explanation, while C invokes methodology where the text cites biology.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
